+function Xx(s) {
+  const e = s.group
+      .toUpperCase()
+      .normalize('NFD')
+      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, ''),
+    t = s.name
+      .toUpperCase()
+      .normalize('NFD')
+      .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, ''),
+    i = s.url.toLowerCase();
+  return e.includes('SERIE') || t.includes('S0') || i.includes('/series/')
+    ? 'series'
+    : e.includes('FILME') ||
+        e.includes('VOD') ||
+        i.includes('/movie/') ||
+        /\.(mp4|mkv|avi|mov|m4v)(\?|$)/i.test(i)
+      ? 'movie'
+      : 'live';

+  async executeWithRetry(e, t, i = 'Unknown') {
+    const { maxRetries: r, baseDelay: n, backoffMultiplier: a } = this.config;
+    if (ae.isSourceBlocked(t))
+      throw (

+        new Error('SOURCE_BLOCKED')
+      );

+        }
+      }

+        ae.blockSource(t, this.config.circuitBreakerDuration)),
+      o
+    );
+  }

+  }

+      }

+      } catch (o) {

+      }
+    }

+  }
+  getCircuitBreakerStatus(e) {

+          failures: t.failures || 0,

+        }

+  }

+  }
